subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Gudarz the Parsi lay sleeping but was awakened; was unconscious but gained consciousness. He became a valiant commander of the hosts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا گودرز پارسی خفته بود بیدار شد بیهوش بود هوشیار گشت شهسوار لشکر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
